status.title: HAL Command Center
status.summary: Local program manager for NewRidgeFinancial 2.0. HAL can guide staff through the pages, surface priorities, explain local status, and preserve the external-action firewall.

modelLanes.name: 21B reasoning lane
modelLanes.role: Program review, prioritization, and structured reasoning

modelLanes.name: 30B escalation lane
modelLanes.role: Second-opinion review for complex or high-risk questions

askHal.title: Ask HAL
askHal.summary: HAL is currently operating as a local program manager. AI model lanes are intentionally not connected yet.
askHal.response: I can navigate the program, explain each page, show priorities, and keep work inside the read-only safety boundary. Model lanes will be added after this local manager layer is stable.

sources.title: Read-only source intake
sources.summary: Source pages are treated as read-only views. HAL can explain status and route staff to the right page, but it cannot write back.

items.label: SoftDent
items.detail: Production, collections, A/R, and export health.

items.label: QuickBooks
items.detail: P&L, expenses, EBITDA candidates, and sync status.

items.label: Documents
items.detail: Accounting document queue, extraction, and review status.

items.label: Library
items.detail: Policies, statements, claims, clinical files, and reports.

reasoning.title: Local reasoning core
reasoning.summary: The reasoning core is staged but model-free. It organizes local program state into Ready, Needs review, and Blocked lanes.

lanes.label: Ready
lanes.detail: Pages and queues that can be reviewed immediately.

lanes.label: Needs review
lanes.detail: Items that require staff confirmation before any next step.

lanes.label: Blocked
lanes.detail: Items waiting on missing information or external systems.

workSurfaces.title: Staff work surfaces
workSurfaces.summary: HAL can open each program surface and explain what staff should use it for.

items.label: Financial Dashboard
items.detail: Owner-level production, collections, A/R, EBITDA, payer mix, and provider view.

items.label: Claims Workbench
items.detail: Draft, needs-review, ready, and denied claim review lanes.

items.label: Insurance Narratives
items.detail: Review-only narrative drafting flow and source-fact references.

items.label: Accounting Documents
items.detail: Document intake, extraction, posting queue review, and period summary.

items.label: A/R & Collections
items.detail: Outstanding A/R, aging buckets, collections trend, and follow-up queue.

items.label: Document Library
items.detail: Searchable read-only repository and selected document preview.

firewall.title: External action firewall
firewall.summary: HAL cannot perform external actions from this program. The safety boundary is enforced by design.

priorities.title: Today’s operator priorities
items: Review claims in the Needs Review lane before any payer-facing work.
Check SoftDent and QuickBooks read-only source freshness.
Use the A/R & Collections page to identify aged balances.
Keep document posting work in review status until staff approval.
